changes.comment: Add RetainingRingBuffer<T extends { seq: number }> to the collections packlet — a generic bounded most-recent-N ring with O(1) eviction, monotonic-seq cursor paging, and predicate filtering (query({ sinceSeq?, limit?, filter? })). lastSeq is stable across clear(). A pure storage substrate: the caller mints each record (assigning its own seq/timestamp); the buffer only retains/evicts/queries. Companion interfaces IRetainedRecord, IRetainingRingBufferCreateParams, IRetainingRingBufferQuery exported top-level.
